title: NOVERIS New Landscape Concept Art Pack
styleGuide: New NOVERIS space scenes: retro-futurist sci-fi concept art, dark cinematic atmosphere, blue-black space, warm amber civilization light, subtle orbital diagrams, painterly premium game key-art finish, minimal editorial composition.

prompts.title: Orbital Elevator Over the Terminator
prompts.prompt: A colossal orbital elevator rising from the night side of an alien planet into a ring of cargo stations, planet curve below, amber city lights tracing continents, blue atmospheric rim glow, tiny ships moving along the tether, faint orbital diagram lines, retro-futurist NOVERIS sci-fi concept art, painterly premium game key art, wide 16:9, no text, no logo, no watermark.

prompts.prompt: A vast alien biosphere cathedral grown from luminous fungal trees and glass habitat arches, cyan bioluminescent canopy, amber colony lights woven through living roots, distant moons and orbit lines overhead, dark cinematic retro-futurist NOVERIS concept art, wide 16:9, no text, no logo, no watermark.
